With the Brotherhood finished (or recruited), the player is asked to help protect the president during his visit.
After the president's visit, the player is told to go see General Oliver in his temporary quarters.
Upon speaking to General Oliver, the dam fight breaks out.
Quest failure, Moore was likely killed.
